rationale: Add a helper that exposes every conjunct of `next_ensures` (including the per-index `well_typed_events` foralls with concrete triggers and the `event_seq()` unfolding) as separate ensures, then invoke it for both r1 and r2 inside an `if` that captures the antecedent, so z3 sees aligned atomic hypotheses on the two runs and can use sequence extensionality (`=~=`) to lift any pointwise equality up to the structural `==` required by `det_*_equal`.
